review_title: Great job with POP
description: I love using POP and you feel the care the developers put inside it.
author: Antoine C.
pros: All the tools included make it one of the best SEO tools out there.
cons: It takes some time to get used to but the interface is user-friendly enough.

review_title: It works well and is affordable. Great for individual bloggers and solopreneurs.
description: I like that I get a tool that helps optimize content as well as other top tools like Frase and Surfer. But it has a huge edge because it's actually affordable and doesn't force you to spend money and lose credits as is the case with the other tools I mentioned. There's a lot of care from the team to generate results and educate customers. I appreciate that and like that I can achieve my SEO goals as an individual business owner with limited resources.
author: Debashri D.
pros: As someone who has invested in Frase and SurferSEO, I like POP because you can actually buy a specific number of credits at an affordable rate. You don't HAVE to subscribe on a monthly basis and then rush to use up all your credits before they expire. They seem to have really in-depth optimization suggestions and know what they're doing. I like that they have a very conversational tone going on throughout the site and actually feel like they talk to you.
cons: What I mentioned as a benefit could also be a con - for example, their UX/UI is friendly and simple but you do get the sense you need to figure out stuff as opposed to the very fed approach by Surfer.

review_title: This tool is pretty damn good!
description: I like it a lot, and I am confident that [sensitive content hidden] will make this even better in the future, as well as fix any issues I had with it.
author: Steven E.
pros: I found it relatively easy to use, and the data it uses is very helpful for our on-page edits.
cons: The AI writer has been very repetitive, and I feel I should not have to manage and edit such an issue. The internal prompting should cover such issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Onsite Optimizer!
description: Experience has been great. Have been using it for my agency and my clients for the last 60 days and we have gotten way better insights on our onsite structure than SEMrush which has been our go to for a decade.
author: Jonathan J.
pros: POP has really helped cut down on our client SEO research. The data is strong and very valuable for what we use it for.
cons: UI can be improved. But overall its a great service that I would change little about except for a few things on the design side.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good on-page optimisation tool
description: A useful tool that supports daily agency activities. I would recommend this, especially for smaller agencies, as it can help to reduce time spent on the on-page optimisation.
author: Marek D.
pros: On-page analysis and the watchdog feature are very helpful for keyword and page optimisation, as well as change tracking.
cons: Keyword strategy is a good feature, but in my opinion, it should allow creating multiple keyword strategies for a single domain project, especially when credits are used, so it's not a freebie.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Its like an Amusement Park for SEO
description: I'll stick with it just for the sake of the AI writer and the backbone of the business being [sensitive content hidden] lets me know that we are in good hands when it comes to protecting the human side of SEO
author: Tamia P.
pros: I'm an overthinker and POP helps me execute instead of the paralysis by analysis that I was stuck in for so long
cons: The features take some getting use to... i dont fully understand all of the systems but i am working through the course. I really wish the keyword search was as simple as semrush or moz
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: POP - A Great SEO Tool In Your Toolbox
description: Overall I've found POP to be a fantastic tool for optimizing pages during web development and for SEO optimizing in an ongoing way. I highly recommend it and I appreciate the innovations that [sensitive content hidden] and his team continuously create.
author: Ian C.
pros: I have found that POP provides some of the best AI content support. Many apps try to write too much content and they are very redundant and obviously AI driven. POP uses a combination of inputs from the user as well as analytics to shape the content then write it. The end product is usually very good.
cons: Sometimes when it's pulling in competitive ranking sites, it pulls in the info type sites like Wikipedia and others that aren't relevant for local rankings....ie. you're not competing with Wikipedia, you're competing with other local competitors.

review_title: POP - On Page SEO - When guessing is not enough
description: I love POP, and for a person who wants to ensure we are seeing progress, the ability to make changes and then set notifications.
author: Christopher H.
pros: I love the ease of onboarding and how quickly you can move into a project and start.
cons: If I had to list something it would be an inconsistent UI when going deeper into the product.

review_title: The best of the pack when it comes to SEO Optimization
author: Martin S.
pros: I love that it's build on sound SEO fundamentals. I've tried at least 6 other apps that claim to do what PageOptimizer Pro does but none compare.
cons: The more you understand the foundations of SEO, the better you'll be at leveraging POP. This is the only reason I wouldn't recommend the tool. If you're a complete novice throwing up a Wix site, it may not be for you. It would be better if it could tell me exactly what to change and do it for me. At that point SEO really would be "dead" like many people claim because it would be AI vs AI.

review_title: One of my favorite tools for SEO
description: very positive. Easy interface and navigation.
author: BC M.
pros: I love the watchdog feature and the multiple ways you can measure your NLP and EEAT against your competitors.
cons: nothing. Nice tool and affordable. I tend to use it more than other similar tools that I used to use like ahrefs and semrush.

review_title: Great Product to Boost Rankings
description: It's been great so far and proven to be a valuable tool.
author: Daniele D.
pros: It provides valuable insight into how I can improve existing content to improve rankings.
cons: I had issues integrating the chatGPT api to use the editor. I still haven't managed to use it.

review_title: Elizabeth Donaldson
description: It works fine unless I have an issue, then support is lacking. [sensitive content hidden] from Income School has been able to help me when in need.
author: Elizabeth D.
pros: The ability to increase my blog production.
cons: Support is not very helpful in the few times I have needed help.

review_title: Best tool for on page optimization
author: Victor F.
pros: On point advice. Love the accuracy and ease of use.
cons: Can't think of any, as I am using this tool for on-page SEO, and it does its job.

review_title: I've found POP great as an end user, and integrated into our product via API
author: Paul S.
pros: The focus on on-page SEO. The relationship between the score and actual results.
cons: The UI didn't initially fit into a phone very well, but they've recently done a re-design and it's getting better. Doesn't work equally well in all languages, even those that are supported.

review_title: Page optimizer Pro rocks
description: It's been awesome to see my SERP results change after a few updates to website . Thank you, Page Optimizer Pro for your help!!!!
author: wally S.
pros: Page optimizer pro was easy to navigate, produced quick results, and had a huge impact on my SEO
cons: I was initially confused on credit system,

review_title: POP is easy to use and brilliant at what it does
description: I've reviewed quite a lot of platforms that claim they help with SEO but with the new enhancements, POP is definitely one I'm glad I have in my toolbox
author: Andy R.
pros: Simply, it works! The new AI integration really supercharges the whole process, I have definitely seen rankings gains using it
cons: Sometimes in the early days switching between the different options of how to review pages was a bit confusing but it seems better now

review_title: Easy to use
description: My overall experience with PageOptimizer Pro has been good
author: Peter H.
pros: Its easy to use and easy to understand, you don't need to be an expert to use it.
cons: The watchdog system was a bit glitchy to start with, i think its better now

review_title: Great SEO Management Tool!
author: Kevin S.
pros: Allows my SEO team to optimize every area of our clients pages
cons: I found it a little confusing at first. It works differently then most SEO tools we have used in the past.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple and insightful.
author: Samuel B.
pros: I find POP intuitive and easy to use. As a tool to help me make sure my on page SEO is up to speed, it allows me to quickly identify improvements I can make. I look forward to further optimising my site with the insights gained from POP.
cons: The only thing I don't like is that using the AI features requires a lot of credits.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great onpage optimisation content creator
description: Very positive! Would recommend to anyone looking to create content!
author: Callum M.
pros: Creates great content for ranking on google. All pages i have created so far do very well in SERPs
cons: Slightly confusing to learn at first but once you do great tool. Although often writes in American english only
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great even for beginners!
author: Melissa J.
pros: Hands down the competitor analysis. I'm still new in my SEO journey and found POP while trying to learn more to get better results for my clients. Being able to see how my clients sites stack up against the competition in just a few minutes saves me so much time.
cons: Haven't found anything yet, I'm still exploring the software and getting into it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic Tool To Optimise Website Content
description: Easy to use, its clear and concise. Tells you what to do, its continually rolling out new features which I think is important in this fast paced AI world.
author: Elisha D.
pros: I like seeing Google Entities and NLP on client website pages its clear and easy to understand. Content optimisation score.
cons: I would like that you could pull more reports on entities, NLP so you can share with clients for work proof and improvement on site.

review_title: Amazing SEO Tool to help the Little Guy Compete and Beat the Big Guys
author: Steve K.
pros: The tool allowed me to get listed on page one for many target keywords. The fact I could compete with very well-known brands/websites in a relatively short time frame was mind-blowing.
cons: The suggestions can be confusing. At times after you implement a suggested change the tool comes back with a new update. While the tool then provides a new score it can take a while to reach a high enough score. This does not happen for easier keywords but a lot of it also has to do with my lack of writing skills.

review_title: You get more than you think and the impact it's great
description: For us it was a software test and we continue using it after 6 months
author: Juan B.
pros: The achievements and findings of what we couldn't see & the easy view of how we can compare URL's from competitors
cons: It's not easy for not advance users. Although it tries to.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My go-to keyword research and page opimization software.
description: One of the best tools I've used for keyword research and on-page SEO performance to date. Would recommend to any beginner or advanced SEO.
author: Marc-Aurele L.
pros: I love the visual SILOs viewer and how easy it is to find topic clusters that actually make sense and that are unique. The on-page optimizer is also a great tool to easily optimize your page for higher rankings.
cons: The AI writer for page optimization could be a little more UI/UX friendly when it outputs. As of now, it mostly just spits out large amounts of text.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
